**Source:** [Device Tree Specification](https://devicetree-specification.readthedocs.io/)

## gpio-controller

Property name: `gpio-controller`

Value type: `<empty>`

The presence of a `gpio-controller` property marks the node as a GPIO controller node.

---

**Source:** Linux kernel Documentation

```
- gpio-controller: Marks the device as a GPIO controller
```
